nasb.text: Then the book will be given to the one who is illiterate, saying, “Please read this.” And he will say, “I cannot read.”

esv.text: And when they give the book to one who cannot read, saying, “Read this,” he says, “I cannot read.”

cnv.text: 人又把這書卷交給不識字的人，說：“請念吧！”他必回答：“我不識字。”

ccb.text: 你们把书卷交给不识字的人读，他会说：“我不识字。”

csbs.text: 如果将这书卷交给不识字的人，说：“请你读一读”，他必说：“我不识字。”
